Localization.Name: Corsair 2953 Ship Showdown Poster
Localization.Description: Congratulations to the Corsair for winning the 2953 Ship Showdown. This poster celebrates the victory of this iconic, asymmetrical Drake Interplanetary ship by capturing it mid-conflict with guns blazing.
